labs.title: ICMP connectivity testing
labs.description: Test whether a host is reachable over the network and measure round-trip time using ICMP echo requests.
instructions: Open a terminal on your Linux machine
Run: ping google.com
Observe the output and note what information is displayed
Run: ping -c 4 google.com
Observe the output and note what information is displayed
Compare the results with what was discussed in the lecture
Take notes on any differences or new observations

labs.title: Secure remote shell access
labs.description: Connect to a remote machine securely over an encrypted channel — the standard way to administer Linux servers.
instructions: Open a terminal on your Linux machine
Research the concept: Secure remote shell access
Try to find related commands and tools
Document your findings
Compare the results with what was discussed in the lecture
Take notes on any differences or new observations

labs.title: System resource monitor
labs.description: Live view of running processes and system resource usage — CPU, memory, load average.
instructions: Open a terminal on your Linux machine
Run: top
Observe the output and note what information is displayed
Compare the results with what was discussed in the lecture
Take notes on any differences or new observations

labs.title: Package management
labs.description: Install, update, and remove software packages on Debian/Ubuntu systems.
instructions: Open a terminal on your Linux machine
Run: apt update
Observe the output and note what information is displayed
Run: apt install package
Observe the output and note what information is displayed
Compare the results with what was discussed in the lecture
Take notes on any differences or new observations
